prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-MMBFFACCSET-6PC-MM2117 Product Type: JEWELRY_SET Brand (from catalog): Disney Existing Title: Disney Minnie Mouse 6pc Girls BFF Fashion Jewelry Hair Accessories Set with Bracelets Ring Hair Clips, Multicolor, Ages 3+ Description: This Minnie Mouse Best Friends Gift Fashion Hair Accessories Set is the perfect gift for little ones to give and share with a BFF. The girls jewelry and hair accessories set comes with two BFF complementing bracelets, two glittery metallic snap hair clips and two matching plastic rings featuring Minnie Mouse, all in pretty blue, purple, pink and white colors.

Matching and coordinated with cute Minnie Mouse and friends graphic, the friendship charm bracelets are a sweet way for little ones to express their admiration and friendship for their BFF, and this way, they can be together even when they’re apart. Plus, the cute Minnie Mouse hair clips or snap clips and rings are fun hair accessories and jewelry pieces that little ones can share, play and style with one another on play dates, for birthday parties, dress up and pretend play, for school and more.

Great for everyday use, your little one will easily be able to dress themselves with these easy-to-wear Minnie Mouse hair accessories and jewelry; the Minnie Mouse matching BFF charm bracelets are stretchy and comfortable, while the clips are easy for a small hand to maneuver. The safe and comfortable hair clips, bracelets, and rings make it easy for your tiny playmates to switch out accessories independently without damaging their hair or pinching their skin. A great gift or stocking stuffer for little Disney Minnie Mouse fashionistas.

Officially licensed Disney Minnie Mouse merchandise.

Recommended Ages: 3+

Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts Search Terms: best friend gifts stocking stuffer charm bracelet plastic accessory toys for girls holiday toy list 2021 sister gifts christmas hanukkah fashionista Disney junior girly stuff fine motor toys learning and educational toys dress up pretend play fun Features: - MINNIE MOUSE BEST FRIEND GIFTS SET: This Minnie Mouse BFF fashion jewelry and hair accessories set is the perfect gift for little ones to give and share with a best friend; the accessories set comes with two complementing BFF charm bracelets, two snap hair clips and two Minnie Mouse rings - MATCHING MINNIE MOUSE CHARM BRACLETS: Matching and coordinated with cute a Minnie Mouse graphic, the BFF charm bracelets are a sweet way for little ones to express admiration and friendship for one of their closest friends, and this way, they can be together even when they’re apart - CUTE MINNIE MOUSE HAIR CLIPS AND RINGS: The Minnie Mouse hair clips and plastic rings are also cute accessories that little ones can share, play and style with one another on play dates and more; adorable fashion jewelry and hair accessories are great for everyday wear, dress up or pretend play! - DESIGNED WITH SMALL HANDS IN MIND: All the girls hair accessories and jewelry pieces included in this best friend gifts set are comfortable, safe and easy to wear, designed with little hands in mind! Little Minnie Mouse fans will feel oh so grown up styling the hair clips and accessorizing all on their own - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 7 x 1.5 x 8 inches; Weight: 0.15lbs; Colors: Pink, Purple, Blue; Material: Plastic; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Officially licensed merchandise; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
